# Research - 2026-06-27

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> 1-day delta on 2026-06-26. Friday (day 6) -> weekly repos
> (claude-code, aider) skipped silently. Three NEW items from
> 06-26/06-27. #1 (cline #11885) caps MCP tool names at 64 chars;
> `mapToolInfo` (`src/mcp/client.ts:134`) stores raw `tool.name`
> and `lowerMcpToolsForOpenAIShaped` (`src/providers/transform.ts:449`)
> forwards it, so SAP-routed gpt-* / o3 / haiku 400 on >64 chars.
> #2 (cline #11875) cancels queued prompts; our `submitPromptQueue`
> (`src/cli/interactive.ts:101`) has push + drain but NO
> inspect/cancel. #3 (kilocode #11703 sandbox self-disable) --
> `src/core/router.ts` keeps probing a 401/403 deployment for the
> whole session. opencode #34125 + #34145 (MCP OAuth refresh +
> error) need an OAuth flow we lack (`src/mcp/config.ts:25` is
> static `apiKey`); defer. cline 06-27 (#11903/11904) SDK-internal.
> kilocode 06-26 batch was VSCode/JetBrains UX.

## Executive Summary

- **#1 cline #11885 (~3h)**: Cap + sanitize + hash-suffix MCP tool
  names so SAP OpenAI-shaped deployments stop 400'ing on long
  `server-github`-style names.
- **#2 cline #11875 (~2h)**: Add `/queue list` and `/queue clear [N]`
  so a mistyped follow-up can be dropped before it fires. Pure REPL.
- **#3 kilocode #11703 (~3h)**: Per-route consecutive-permanent-
  failure counter; auto-disable a route after 3x 401/403/404.
  Transient (5xx) still goes via `src/core/error-backoff.ts`.
- **Carryover**: demote-claude-code at 7 cycles, aider 30-day
  silent -- propose monthly cadence next brief. auto-implement
  queue EMPTY (verified `gh issue list`).

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Cap and sanitize MCP tool names for OpenAI-shaped deployments (Category: mcp, ~3h)

- **What**: New `sanitizeMcpToolName(serverName, toolName)` in
  `src/mcp/client.ts`: (a) replace `[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]+` with `_`,
  (b) prefix `${sanitizedServer}__`, (c) if >64 chars, truncate
  and append 8-char SHA-256 hash of the original. Apply inside
  `mapToolInfo` (`:134`) so cached `McpToolInfo.name` is already
  provider-safe. Extend `findToolServer` (`:546`) and `callTool`
  (`:476`) to look up the original via a transformed->raw Map.
  Tests: short passthrough; dots/slashes sanitized; >64 truncated
  + hashed; exact-64 unchanged; distinct hashes for distinct long
  inputs.
- **Why**: SAP-routed gpt-5.5, gpt-nano, o3, claude-haiku enforce
  64-char + `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]` on `tools[].function.name` and 400
  the WHOLE request when one MCP tool violates it. With the
  `mcp__server__tool` convention (`src/permission/index.ts:31`),
  `server-github`'s `get_pull_request_review_comments` already
  pushes the prefixed name past the cap. Anthropic tolerates 128
  so this is invisible until the user switches model.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11885 (commit `5a9c637`, 2026-06-26,
  `+59 -1`, `sdk/packages/core/src/extensions/mcp/name-transform.ts`).
- **Category**: mcp. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 2. Queue inspect + cancel for chained follow-ups (Category: command, ~2h)

- **What**: New slash branch in `src/cli/interactive.ts` next to
  the `mcp` case at `:1085`: `/queue list` prints indexed previews
  of `state.submitPromptQueue`; `/queue clear` empties; `/queue
  clear <N>` removes a single 1-based entry; `/queue` alone
  aliases `list`. No orchestrator coupling -- queue is REPL-local.
  Tests: enqueue 3 -> list shows 3 with previews; `clear 2`
  removes the middle; `clear` empties.
- **Why**: Today, if a slash command synthesizes a follow-up via
  `enqueueSubmitPrompt` (`:117`) and the user notices it's wrong,
  the only escape is Ctrl+C the whole session. Cline's #11875 hit
  the same UX trap on the VSCode side.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11875 (commit `ed685b2`, 2026-06-26,
  `+134 -0`, `apps/vscode/src/core/controller/task/cancelQueuedPrompt.ts`).
- **Category**: command. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 3. Auto-disable a route after N consecutive permanent failures (Category: config, ~3h)

- **What**: In `src/core/router.ts`, attach a transient
  `consecutiveFailures: Map<routeId, number>` keyed by
  `deploymentId` (fall back to `modelName`). Each `sendChat` that
  errors with a permanent class (401, 403, 404, `model_not_found`,
  `deployment_not_found`) increments; success resets. At
  `routeFailureThreshold` (default 3, configurable in
  `routing-config.json`), mark the route disabled for the rest of
  the session and fall through to the next match. Print one
  yellow warning on first disable. Transient (5xx, network) MUST
  NOT count -- those stay on `src/core/error-backoff.ts`. Tests:
  3x 401 disables; 3x 503 does not; success resets; disabled
  route is skipped.
- **Why**: A stale routing entry (deleted deployment, expired
  token) currently consumes retry budget every turn for the whole
  session, masking the next-priority route. Mirrors kilocode
  #11703's sandbox self-disable.
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode#11703 (commit `c153d17`,
  2026-06-26, `fix-sandbox-config-self-disable`). Adapted to
  routing -- alexi has no sandbox surface.
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (~3h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: #2 (2h, REPL) -> #1 (3h, MCP) -> #3 (3h, router).
   #2 first (zero risk); #1 next because it unblocks MCP on gpt-*
   routes that #3's counter would otherwise disable; #3 last.
2. **Defer**: opencode #34125 + #34145 (MCP OAuth refresh +
   error surfacing). Needs a full OAuth discovery + token store
   we don't have. Track in a dedicated issue.
3. **Pipeline health**: auto-implement queue EMPTY. All three fit
   one engineering day total. Propose demoting claude-code to
   monthly cadence next brief (7-cycle dryness streak hit).
